prompt: Create a cinematic vertical 9:16 fantasy sports bedroom scene at night: NEYMAR JR. in a yellow Brazil national team jersey, blue shorts, green-and-white socks, and football boots bursts dramatically out of a giant framed comic-book poster leaning against the wall, as if breaking through paper into the real room. The poster headline reads “NEYMAR JR.” in huge yellow comic lettering on a sky-blue background, and its panels show a football stadium, Brazilian flags, a street scene, and a soccer ball in a bright vintage comic style. The player is mid-stride, leaning forward with arms out for balance, glowing backlight pouring through the torn poster hole, torn paper shards flying around him, sparks and debris suspended in the air, and his face softly blurred/anonymized. The bedroom is cozy and messy, lit by warm amber lamps and string lights along the wall-ceiling corner. Decorate the walls with exactly 8 visible superhero/comic posters: Spider-Man, Amazing Spider-Man, Batman, X-Men, Uncanny X-Men, another X-Men cover, a partial Spider-Man poster at left, and one dark space-themed poster near the bed. Add exactly 1 blue Brazil football scarf/banner on the right wall. Include exactly 2 bedside lamps, one on each side area. The floor is cluttered with exactly 12 visible loose objects or clothing piles: a blue jersey on the left floor, black headphones, two game controllers, a white shirt, a red-and-blue garment, a gray hoodie, a yellow Brazil jersey pile, a green-and-yellow fabric pile, a pair of football boots, a single shoe near the bed, and scattered torn paper pieces. Add a bed on the right with rumpled bedding and a green-yellow scarf or blanket, a nightstand on the left with small speakers or gadgets, and soft realistic shadows. Style: photorealistic room and athlete combined with oversized comic-book artwork, dynamic magical-realism action, warm orange ambient light, high detail, shallow depth of field, dramatic rim lighting, no watermark, no extra readable text beyond the poster title and recognizable comic poster titles.
